site.title: Melix · Local AI runtime for Apple Silicon

seo.description: Melix is a local AI runtime for Apple Silicon. Run models, train LoRA locally, benchmark, evaluate, and operate through CLI and macOS tools with a single workflow.
seo.ogDescription: Build local AI workflows in one place on your Mac.

identity.valueProposition: 本地模型运行、LoRA 微调、基准测试、评测、CLI 与 macOS 入口一体化。

title.en: A local AI runtime for Apple Silicon.
title.zh: 一款面向 Apple Silicon 的本地 AI 运行时。

subtitle.en: Run models, fine-tune LoRA, benchmark, and evaluate—on one local Mac workflow.
subtitle.zh: 在一套本地化流程中完成模型运行、LoRA 微调、基准测试与评测。

title.en: Local AI is powerful. Operating it is fragmented.
title.zh: 本地 AI 很强大，但操作链路往往支离破碎。

copy.en: Model serving, tuning, benchmarking, and evaluation are usually split across terminals, scripts, and notebooks. Melix compresses them into one local-first runtime.
copy.zh: 模型服务、微调、基准和评测常被拆散到终端、脚本、Notebook。Melix 将它们压缩为一个本地优先运行时。

subheading.zh: 服务化、微调、基准测试、评测

text.en: Run local model sessions on Apple Silicon.
text.zh: 在 Apple Silicon 上启动本地模型会话。

text.en: Train and manage LoRA adapters locally.
text.zh: 在本地训练并管理 LoRA 适配器。

text.en: Measure model and adapter behavior with repeatable runs.
text.zh: 通过可复现的运行过程测量模型与适配器行为。

text.en: Compare outputs, results, and workflow quality over time.
text.zh: 持续对比输出结果与工作流质量。

heading.en: A runtime layer between models and workflows.
heading.zh: 连接模型与工作流的运行时层。

flow.zh: 服务化 → 微调 → 基准测试 → 评测

supporting.en: Define your model stack once and reuse it across CLI and UI operations.
supporting.zh: 先定义模型栈后复用到 CLI 与界面操作。

copy.en: Melix is designed for developers and AI builders who operate local models daily — from CLI workflows to native macOS surfaces and menubar-level control.
copy.zh: Melix 面向日常使用本地模型的开发者和 AI 构建者，覆盖 CLI、原生 macOS 界面到菜单栏级控制。

zh: 已支持的 macOS 版本

en: Open the app or run CLI workflow.
Run your first model / benchmark / evaluation.
zh: 打开 App 或执行 CLI 工作流。
运行首次模型推理 / 基准测试 / 评测。

availableNow.en: v0.1.0-alpha · local model workflow, LoRA, benchmark/eval, CLI and macOS surfaces
availableNow.zh: v0.1.0-alpha · 本地模型工作流、LoRA、基准与评测、CLI 与 macOS 界面

inProgress.en: v0.2.0-beta · stronger workflow state, agent/tool orchestration, long-running automation
inProgress.zh: v0.2.0-beta · 更完整的状态编排、智能体/工具编排、长时运行自动化

notYet.en: v0.3.0 · production-grade autonomous agent orchestration, cloud collaboration, hosted service
notYet.zh: v0.3.0 · 生产级自治智能体编排、云协作、托管服务
